Attention jeu extrêment addictif. De plus il est lieu de rassemblement de tout les bas fond de l'humanité. Personne dans votre équipe ne cherchera à savoir si vous êtes démarqué ou parti faire un café parce que le seul but, pour tout à chacun est de dribbler et faire une passe un peu trop forte au gardien adverse. Jouez-y peut avant de partir travailler afin de vous plonger dans cette état d'esprit profondément individualiste et dénoué de connexion neuronale et surtout n'oubliez pas, les gens que vous croiserez quand vous sortirez de chez vous n'ont pas à subir toute la frustration que vous aurez accumulé sur ce jeu. Ne les frappez que s'il vous confessent qu'ils jouent à Rematch.

Rematch é um jogo extremamente divertido e viciante. As horas passam voando, especialmente quando se joga com amigos, tornando a experiência ainda mais envolvente e dinâmica.

Apesar disso, ainda há pontos importantes a serem aprimorados. Os servidores precisam de melhorias para oferecer maior estabilidade e desempenho, e alguns bugs — como os goleiros saindo da área com a bola nas mãos — devem ser corrigidos para preservar a competitividade e o realismo da jogabilidade.

Seria muito interessante também a adição de um sistema de estatísticas mais completo, que permita visualizar rapidamente o histórico de partidas e outras métricas relevantes. Esse tipo de recurso é essencial para um jogo de futebol com foco competitivo.

No geral, Rematch está claramente trilhando um caminho promissor. Se os desenvolvedores continuarem ouvindo a comunidade e aprimorando a experiência, o jogo tem tudo para se tornar um título duradouro e de destaque por muitos anos.

I know the game is really new, but the amount of lag you have to fight just to play isn't acceptable.....especially in this day and age with our current technologies and abilities. Furthermore, why would you release a competitive game like this in 2025 without out the ability to play it cross platform?? Especially when this is known to most of the gaming community as a sell point to this particular game?? Definitely isn't worth 30 or more dollars.....Either wait until this game is a bit further along, and the lag is cleaned up some. Maybe wait until the game is much more stable and they finally add cross play or catch it on a $10.00 or less sell in the near future, as I'm not seeing this game in the current state slating highly with recommendations. All the potential is here for sure to be an amazing competitive game, maybe even one of the better onees in the future......but as of now......sub 10 dollars is where I would buy in knowing what I know now.

vraiment lourd, le jeu a un potentiel énorme, mais le gros point noir c'est qu'il est totalement vide. Tuto a peine fonctionnel pas d'ia du tout donc oublier l'idée d'un mode carriere les mechs rendent le jeu en ligne vraiment agréable mais pour  25$ on nous prend un peu pour des cons, surtout avec une boutique jour 1 + passe de combat. Le jeu a tout d'un excellent free to play. conclusion si vous adorez le foot, ou la compétition le jeu va surement vous plaire, mais vous devriez attendre quelques mois que le prix baisse car en l'état c'est franchement chère payer, surtout qu'il a toutes les chances de finir gratuit dans les 1/3 ans a venir vue le model éco du jeu et le public cibler. en l'état avec les bugs et le fait manque total de contenu hors match 5v5 rank ( je ne parle pas de la normal qui est casi injouable en solo/duo ).

If you have friends go for it otherwise all you will meet is the most brainless people on planet earth in any given gamemode. Whole lot of bugs in this game currently but i think the devs are going down to the ubisoft way of making games, just releasing unfinished game cuz of the hype which was never expected from Sloclap since they made Sifu which is such a mindblower. No crossplay at launch was the biggest drawback since getting matches takes a while and the ranking system is based on win streak not on how skilled you are. So even if you are the dumbest player in the world and you play with decent players and get carried you will get ranked up easy which is stupid tbh. I know this is their first multiplayer game but that should not be your excuse to mess up so many things, for example the colouring system does not even work properly for accessories, you set one colour and it shows something else in the match. They are busy collaborating with brands and counting money but they cant fix their game and get the crossplay go live faster and improve their netcode. They are already giving out balancing patch when the game is not even out properly imo. When you make a game you think about every player around the world and not just your home country, the reason im saying this is that i always play on 70-80 pings since we dont have servers here in India. 95% of the people that i meet in casual and ranked are just so stupid they think they can take the ball from one corner to the other all alone HAHA. i mean what do you expect from people who says that this game is so much similar to ROCKET LEAGUE!! Their QC Team is very poor and inexperienced since alot of their meshes have clipping issues and some have their polys deleted or hidden in visible places. I can go on bugs,fixes,improvement all day but i really loved this game and i never expected such average delivery from these guys.

La prochaine fois, pensez à faire passer un test de QI à ceux qui confondent foot et freestyle dans leur salon. Le gars avait personne sur lui, il pouvait juste faire une passe en retrait... mais non ! Monsieur ou Madame a voulu se prendre pour Messi ou Lamine Yamal, alors qu’en vrai il ressemblait plus à Yamine Lamad sous Lexomil.
Conseil d’ami : NE JAMAIS jouer avec des randoms. C’est que des solistes en manque de projecteurs. Joue avec des potes, des vrais, qui jouent collectif, qui lèvent la tête, qui font des passes. Là, tu kiffes vraiment le jeu.
Sinon, honnêtement, le jeu est incroyable. Y’a du potentiel de ouf, faut juste pas tomber avec les joueurs de TikTok.

Great skill based team play. Playing with friends is absolutely brilliant. First game that has grabbed me like this in a long time. Generally low on toxicity, I don't know if it's just early adoption but very little griefing and BM.

Biggest issue I see is the directional passing, which is independent to direction of movement and controlled (on mouse and keyboard) by mouse direction, which is really unforgiving and very hard to be accurate. Nothing is better than a crisp sequence of passes but it's so easy to mess up that I think it contributes to people just blasting the ball up-field or trying to run up the pitch solo. I'm not sure what to suggest as an alternative as I understand the need to independently 'no look' pass but it feels like it needs refinement to encourage collaborative team play. 

Devs are releasing crash fixes daily and I can feel the game getting more stable as crashes have become less frequent.

Other minor feedback: 
Need a retry button on the practice scenarios - going to the main menu after each attempt is a pain.
Would love to be able to reconnect to a non ranked match after getting DC'd but I understand that means that you'd have to reserve the slot from others.
Would be nice to be able to have an option to overwrite people's map choices as the visuals can be distracting when the switch each goal.
Biggest one: being able to block the keeper from their goal kick is insanely obnoxious. Half a second of the ball not being Interceptable out of a keepers kick would fix this entirely. Blocking the keeper doesn't add to the game in any way and is just super frustrating cheesy nonsense. 

In the end, I absolutely recommend the game.

I never write reviews, but i'm writing one now because this game is a GEM. Playing on Gamepass until crossplay is fixed if you are wondering why my hours are lower. Seriously wtf thought... just delay the launch until you have crossplay it's 2025.. I will give props to the CEO for being honest and communicative about the situation so that's a positive. Anyways..

I have thousands of hours in rocket league and have played at the highest rank. Briefly getting into the top fifty back in season 2. I'm currently washed and rarely play, but I can get back to Champ 2-3 fairly easily as an old man. 

I also was a highly competitive soccer player. I played on the ODP team. I also had D1 scholarships out of highschool to power 5 conferences. 

This game is the most accurate representation of what it feels like to play soccer (or any sport really) in a video game to date. Yes it still has some jank. There's some things that need fixed and a few balance tweaks here and there, but hot damn is the base of the game good. It's immediately apparent who has and hasn't played organized sports before, and real life soccer knowledge translates heavily. 

The game wants you to play as a team. If you are frustrated with terrible teammates when you start it does get better quickly when you raise the ranks. BE The Catalyst for your team. Get on the mic. It's crazy how far a little friendly encouragement to play together goes. 

I highly recommend jumping into the game, Yes it h as some jank. Yes it is missing crossplay, but with a new game with new mechanics the best time to jump in is always when the community is learning.

NGL game is pretty cheeks lol. Thought I was gonna be a big fan until I played around 10 matches. Lots of ball hogs which I mean it get it but the walls encourage more hogging and the controls are very minimalistic. Not a ton of dribbles or flicks you can do and the ball just gets stolen to easily it’s almost like a latency issue like who’s foot is the ball glued to for the time being and the game doesn’t properly register it the majority of the time when you do make a good tackle or steal. You could call it skill diff or w/e you want but the ♥♥♥♥ is jank AF. Tons of people who don’t want to play keeper will literally leave goal open and just start driving the ball without passing if it’s their turn to keep and that’s hella gay. No thru balls or other passing mechanics like in fifa every thing is just manual directional bs. It’s a lob, shot, or short pass that’s it. Maybe they’ll fix some of this in the future but for now it’s just boring gameplay and most definitely not worth the asking price for the game. I’m talking $10 max for the amount of content you get lmao. Oh and finding a match takes over a minute most of the time and this is a brand new game lmao.

Наиграв 30 часов могу с уверенностью заявить, что эта игра пока что лучшая в сфере футбольных игр или около футбольных на платформе Стим (Фифа не в счет). Игра, по крайней мере на данный момент, еще сырая. С релиза прошла неделя и есть куча как приятных так и не очень моментов, если вам попался мой комментарий - прошу к прочтению. Ниже перечисленные вещи дадут вам ясно понять, захотите ли вы покупать игру за свои кровные, либо нет.
К минусам сначала:
- Баги. Да, да, да, я уже выше сказал, что игра сырая, но некоторые баги просто непростительны. Одним из багов является некий гост, когда игрок пытается пробить по мячу, либо принять, нажимает казалось бы в тайминг, но всё равно не бьет, принимает.
- Вылеты. Вроде как на момент написания этого обзора, разработчики уже устранили эту проблему, но все же: раньше, по крайней мере, после гола вылетала игра с ошибкой UE5 (Unreal Engine 5), после чего приходилось перезаходить. Краши такие происходили крайне часто.
- Рассинхрон. Игра, как я понял, в принципе рассинхронизирована по себе, ибо то у твоего тиммейта одна форма, у тебя другая, поле разное и тд. Особенно ощущается рассинхрон, когда один берет мяч, когда от тебя он находится немного в другой стороне (Возможно потеря пакетов, надо смотреть плашку с данными).
- Анимации. Тоже мог отнести к багам, но решил упомянуть отдельно, так как анимации в этой игре, учитывая, что она динамичная, игнорировать нельзя. Суть в том, что, когда игрок бьет во вратаря, либо вратарь прыгает идеально на мяч, вроде бы забирая его, сработает анимация, резко перестанет работать и мяч пролетит в ворота. Та же тема с ударами: если кто то помешает пробить, будучи рядом - анимация собъется.
- Дёрганное управление. Не знаю как на контролере, но на клаве всё ужасно. Хочешь повернуть влево и затем сразу в право? Это не будет плавно, это будет дёргано, при чем до ужаса, в такие моменты контролировать персонажа невозможно, а уж если хочешь развернуться с поворотом... Ну это тумач.
Теперь к плюсам (Их много, игра сама по себе классная и большой плюс ей в общем, по этому напишу только то, что нравится лично мне, и что можно было бы выделить):
- Частые обновления и патчи. Не смотря на баги, разрабы активно сейчас ведут игру и делают обновления, за что им похвала.
- Уникальные механики. В игре куча уникальных механик, которые я еще не видел в других играх.
- Свобода действий. Под этим словосочетанием, я имею ввиду, что в игре буквально можно делать все что угодно (в рамках игровых механик), и от того появляется куча возможностей, что бы сделать какую то свою связку или придумать комбо дриблинга + удар, или что то в этом роде.
- Быстрый чат. На клавиши 1,2,3 и 4 соответственно, можно сказать 4 разных реплики:
1 - Справимся (настрой команды)
2 - Отлично (похвала)
3 - Извини (ну, тут понятно, извиниться если накосячил :P)
4 - Спасибо (благодарность)
Так же большой плюс быстрого чата в том, что в динамичной игре, очевидно, печатать было бы явно неудобно и неуместно, а так же это может помочь от агрессивных школьников XD.
- Свобода кастомизации. Можно буквально сделать самый уникальный скин в игре, которого нет ни у кого. Кастомизация, лично для меня, очень расширенная.

Quite literally the best sports game since the NFL Blitz / NBA Courtside era.

I am not joking or exaggerating in the slightest. The arcade-y controls make the game feel like an action game rather than your typical birds-eye view sports game.

There is tons of room for skill expression (and lack of skill), which makes practice and improvement rewarding.

The only downside of the current experience is the netcode -- there is a fair bit of desync issues that are most obvious during goalkeeper interactions. Luckily the devs are already working on that, and they're also adding crossplay ASAP due to player feedback.

Please get this game to support a new era of arcade-y and fun-centric sports games -- we've had enough simulators for a long time, let's go back to basic and make things fun again.

UI is god-awful. There's no push-to-talk, there's no custom remapping, there are still some game breaking bugs (ball phasing outside the arena, really fun to have that happen in overtime during a ranked match) etc etc. The game is pretty squarely in the sort of state you'd expect from an early access release. Instead, it's marketed as a full game and has a paid battle pass with plans for corporate shilling (just Puma so far). The UI design is so poor though that even the battle pass page is nigh-impossible to read and you really won't know what you do or don't unlock without paying unless you look it up because the indication makes no sense.

The game is really fun, I would recommend it to anyone who likes video games in general. The game is very technical and has a high skill floor and ceiling. If you are considering buying the game you should know that there is still many areas of the game that can feel "half baked", like the fact that the game lags and can get very glitchy at times. BUT I would still recommend the game if you really find it interesting or think it would be fun.

Nothing I will say here is going to be unique. All the issues are very apparent- however if you want an in depth understanding of Rematch through the eyes of someone with 60hrs since full release, and a further 24hrs on record during the beta, here it is, otherwise see the TLDR at the bottom:

Mechanical Gameplay: Fantastic. This is the primary selling point of Rematch for me. It's done phenomenally well. I see no reason to change much else, except for the slight annoyances such as when you get tackled, your player sometimes runs the opposite way once he gets up. It's fluid gameplay. People will complain about the passing controls- I can only speak for controller on this matter. I hear KBM is horrendously bad for passing, but amazing for shooting. With that said, if you're on controller, and you're finding it hard to pass, sorry but you're just bad. It's so accurate once you get the hang of it, and feels amazing when you pull off a pass that was intended. Overall, the controls for me are a 9 out of 10, responsive, fun and engaging.

Price Point: On release, this game was $43.95 AUD. RIDICULOUS. This game, while it is a breath of fresh air in some ways, shouldn't even be CLOSE to that price point. This is a $20 game at absolute most. Your main competitor is Rocket League- a FREE game, that currently does a lot of things better than Rematch. I can understand a price point on release, and with great love and care, this game has great potential in my opinion to become even better than Rocket League down the line. With that said, the price point is super egregious, and very much against the player. For full transparency, I have the Pro Edition, but that's only because I was luckily enough to have it gifted to me for free by a community member, and I had no intention to actually buy it after the free BETA, even though I had fun. 

I feel like interested buyers shouldn't spend money on this until they lower the price. Force their hand, because otherwise we set a precedent for greediness. Yes, this is a "small indie company", and yes, they need money to make the game better, but they've got their bag now after a very successful release. I full expect the price to drop, and possibly even go completely free within a couple of years, which leads me to my next point.

Longevity:  At this stage, this is an online only game. You have Casual and Ranked Matchmaking. Casual matches have 3v3, 4v4 and 5v5. Ranked only has 5v5. There's a couple of practice modes, workshop drills, but that's it. Not much really to do, except for climb the ranked ladder, and BOY is that PAINFUL. So depending on your drive to climb the ladder, or simply play this game with friends every now and then, this could be a game of two extremes; One where you can absolutely no life it doing the same thing over and over, or more likely, play this game once in a blue moon with some friends. 

RANKED WOES: This is most likely a skill issue, and definitely just me venting, however I would be curious to see if others feel the same way, and if you agree with my suggestion. I hate ranked, with a burning passion. Currently in ranked, you gain +20 RP for a win, and lose -16 RP for a loss. I find this SO brutal. I don't rate myself highly in many video games, but being not so humble here; I am a fantastic Rematch player. I focus on passing the ball, I'm brilliant defensively with tackles and interceptions, I can play GK well and you can verify all of this @DeeZie_TV on twitch ;)  I'll consistently grab 8-12K points every match, even on a loss (at the end of the match, your contributions are displayed by these points, which determines the MVP of the match). And yet, if I queue with randoms in ranked, without fail I'll always get people spamming the ♥♥♥♥ out of easy to read rainbow flicks, egoing their way to giving away possession because nobody knows how to pass. I am still in ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ Bronze because of this. It is. IMPOSSIBLE. To get out. 

I really feel like RP should be based on performance ASWELL as wins and losses in ranked. For example, let's say I lost my match but I carried, ending the match with 14,000 points, and my idiot teammates all get 500-2000 points. I shouldn't lose NEARLY ALL THE POINTS I JUST EARNED from winning ONE MATCH just because the team lost. So; deduct less for better performances is my suggestion! Same goes the other way for wins. Give more points to the MVP. Give less points to the lowest scoring winner. I feel like that would make this a more balanced and enjoyable experience, climbing the ranks. Yes, you could then "farm" points with this system, but at the very least that would lead to PASSING THE ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ BALL. 

Last little gripe about Ranked... I can't believe you shipped it with only 5v5 for ranked. With currently NO CROSSPLAY (it was supposed to be crossplay DAY 1, but still nothing- very frustrating), and a high reliance on other players to join, and be good, ranked is impossible for solo queuing as previously established. ADD 3v3 RANKED. AT LEAST. I'd prefer 4v4, or both- but 3v3 ranked at the very least should be an option for players who want to solo queue. 

Desync: I title this section desync, because now, whenever something goes wrong in a match, me and my friends blame the desync. This game on launch suffered greatly from many buggy issues. The one that persists is how bad the desync is. You caught the ball? Nope, it's in the back of the net because of desync. You just scored a goal on your screen? Nah, it's back in play, dw about it, it's just the desync. This is a major issue in the game that needs to be resolved asap, while this game has momentum. The Sloclap team have done a good job to rectify many issues, but the desync has persisted and I worry may never be resolved. 

Another big issue is achievements. They are super buggy! I'm an achievement hunter, I love grabbing them. This should be a game I could've 100%'d by now, but you won't give me the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ 3 wins in a row achievement no matter what I do- casual matches or ranked, I get 3 wins in a row, and it never counts. I got very lucky and picked up a few bugged achievements early, but another notorious bugged achievement is the one where you have to get an assist as a GK from the penalty box. I'd really like Rematch to be a game I 100% sooner rather than later, and I feel like I should have that already. But this issue has ruined that for me :( 

With that said, here's what I've noticed they have fixed: On launch, there was no way for you to get into ranked. I waited in queue for 40 mins, absolutely no matches. This is now no longer an issue, I'm getting near instant queues. There was also a very frustrating issue where if someone scored in a game, you might crash. To fix this, you had to delete a folder in your App Data, but again this has been somewhat rectified as of a couple of days ago. They are working on making the game stable, and have a great plan in mind for the future of Rematch. It's very promising- but they need to stay consistent.

Overall Verdict:
I do recommend this game if you want to play something fun and you get it at a greatly discounted price, or for free. I don't recommend it for it's greedy price point and lack of longevity, as well as my own personal frustrations with the ranked system. TLDR; watch me play it instead at DeeZie_TV on twitch and decide for yourself.

Слушай же, добрый люд, ибо сейчас поведаю я сказание дивное, да не про змея трёхголового, а байку лукавую про футбол земной и мяч пинательный. Было сие не в тридевятом царстве на Руси, где не пройдет войско темное, не проскочит бомбардир незамеченный (да что там бомбардир, полузащитник не пролетит), а было на чемпионате всемирном, где сборная японская такую оплеуху словила, что аж бутсы в землю вросли. Проиграли знатно. Стыдно, аж сакура поблекла. 

Тут-то и явился муж не простой, да по прозвищу Эго Джинпачи наречённый - бороду не носит, да ума с гору. И промолвил, мол: "Хватит нам футболистов вежливых да командных, хочу я нападающего такого, чтоб один — а как целая орда!"

Так и затеян был промысл великий — «Синяя Тьма», в народе Блю Локом именуемая. Но не тюрьма, где хлеб с водой, а такая, где триста лоботрясов-забивал были заперты с мечтой своею и бутсами. И началась там рубка не на жизнь, а на гол - кто слаб, тот вон, без почёта, без карьеры. Не будет второго шанса, не будет прощения — таков завет тюрьмы сей.

И растил там мудрец самолюбцев богатырских. Да не простых, а огранённых. Эго их тренирует, да не как обычный молодец, а как полководец знатный — требует, чтоб каждый стал эгоистом да забивальщиком лютым, что не пас даёт, а гол кладёт, хоть трое своих в обмороке лежат. Таков был сказ. И будь же он услышан!

I have found it best to describe REMATCH as a "rock-paper-scissors" version of Rocket League.  RL is more "freeform" where the ball doesn't necessarily stick to you naturally.  REMATCH plays similarly to RL except the ball does stick to you.  The rock-paper-scissors comes from the fact that offensively, defensively, and goalie wise - there's different tech to be learned and different counters towards each move.  I find REMATCH to be satisfying in this sense.  Seemingly, on the outside, there isn't nearly as large of a skill ceiling as RL which makes it way easier to want to get into.  However, as I continue to climb the ranks, there is a lot of tech to be learned in all facets.  

When the game runs without lag, the gameplay is very smooth.  It feels rewarding to juke an opponent out, or to tackle the ball off of someone.  Plus, learning new tech for seemingly unbeatable strats (for all those beta players, remember when the backwall pass was kind of nuts?) is even more satisfying. The only issue which I can see annoying a lot of people is that when the lag is bad...it is BAD.  The ball just phasing through you, or you never being able to move the ball, people teleporting....it can get pretty bad.  

Overall, I'm sure they will go through and fix the game.  They have at least made it clear through posts that that is their intention.  With new equipment being added recently as well, I can't see why they wouldn't update it.  The devs seem to be pretty active, and that is such a refreshing sight.  I'm sure in due time the lag issues will work themselves out, and that any gameplay bugs will too.  With all that being said, simply because the game is so addicting, it's an easy recommend for me.

Se você está procurando um jogo cheio de aim assist, gerenciamento de time, e aquele velho esquema de gastar milhões em pacotinhos na esperança de dropar jogadores... então infelizmente esse não é o jogo. A proposta aqui lembra bastante o velho FIFA Street, mas com uma pegada de simulador.

O jogo é muito divertido, mas de vez em quando estressa tanto que dá vontade de socar o teclado ou tacar o mouse na parede, como todo bom jogo de futebol. Graficamente ele é leve e bonito, deve rodar até na sua torradeira.

Achei péssimo mirar chutes e passes com o joystick, uma experiência extremamente frustrante. Jogar com mouse é infinitamente melhor.

Se a lojinha continuar nessa pegada tem tudo pra ser interessante, logo de cara já colocaram uma skin do Bruxo R10. Espero imensamente que venham mais opções de personalização de personagem, gratuitas principalmente.

Sobre a escolha de goleiro, acho que ela deveria ser fixa desde o início da partida. Do jeito que está, fica bem confuso, pois a maioria dos kids que jogam não querem nem tocar a bola, imagine então querer ser goleiro.

В целом игра прикольная. Мне зашла и по стилистике и по геймплею. Хотя я далеко не фанат футбола.
В игре нет никакого сюжета, это чисто онлайновая сессионная игра.
Отличные эмоции в процессе игры, радуешься каждому забитому голу вашей командой.
Но в игре есть минусы, которые я надеюсь исправят.
Мне абсолютно не понятно с какого перепуга в игре жесточайшая монетизация если игра и так платная, пусть и не особо дорогая. Делайте тогда F2P.
Также будучи новичком в этой игре мне было сложновато разобраться с некоторыми механиками. В обучении только базовые приемы, в общем обучение никакое в игре. Легче в ютубе учиться, особенно игре за вратаря.
Но самый главный минус, что в если вы России или в странах СНГ, то вероятно у Вас будет высокий пинг.
Совет, если у Вас с Европой пинг больше 50 мс можете даже не пытаться играть в эту игру. По моим наблюдениям пинг с которым комфортно играть это 50 и ниже в игре. При пинге 60-80 уже начинаются лаги, то мячик не успел отбить, то вроде анимация прошла, но по мячу не попал. А если пинг 80-100+ это неиграбельно от слова совсем. В общем пока разработчики не решат проблему с пингом игру советовать не могу.

I'd LOVE to recommend this, the core game play loop is awesome, but it's not sustainable in it's current state.

For example, my teammate ran out of goal so I was forced to replace him, fine I guess. We score, I'm placed in net again, annoying, but sure. We concede, teammate leaves, I'm placed in goal for the THIRD time running. 

Another issue is the lack of alternate ranked modes. 5v5 is fine for a squad, but when you you're playing solo, or in a duo, the 5v5 mode feels difficult to make an impact in. 

Things like this don't affect the game much on their own, but when combined cause frustration and friction that the average player trying to get a few games in after a busy day won't want to deal with.

Je ne joue pas à un jeux de foot de base et je m'en branle de blue lock donc je vais vous faire un vraie commentaire de ce que je pense sur le jeux.
Rematch à un potentiel pour le future mais actuellement ne prenait pas le jeux maintenant si vous être prêt à vous prendre les bugs et le mécanisme incompris du jeux haha.
En ayant 15h de jeux, j'ai vue quand même beaucoup de chose positif et négative :
Positif :
-Le jeux à un beau potentiel
-Le jeux est unique en sont genre.
-Il est très addictif quand même, il porte bien son nom

Négatif :
-Serveur bugé
-Mécanisme de jeux à revoir sur pas mal de point
-Jeux très volatile au niveau de la rapidité sur les actions et les mouvements
-Bug de mouvement ou des personnes s'envole dans les airs en mettant des têtes à l'infini.
-Les priorités sont à revoir au niveau combats comme le premier qui aura le ballon car c'est le premier qui enclenche l'animation qui a le ballon en premier
-Le gardien qui est beaucoup trop fort et trop assistés avec une jolie aimbot ou le ballon ce téléporte sur lui.
-Les hit box des hits de tacle ou des contrôles sont beaucoup trop abusé.

De ce que je vois en haut le trailer vend bien le jeux car il est très fluide sur le trailer alors qu'en jeux c'est pas la même.
Le jeux à un potentiel je me répète mais actuellement mais c'est un non catégorique acutellement, encore une béta.

Rematch, c’est clairement pas un mauvais jeu, en tout cas sur le papier. L’idée est là, l’ambiance est sympa, et y’a moyen de vraiment s’amuser. C’est même un nouveau type de jeu qui est trop BIEN ! (Sur le papier, du moins) Mais en pratique, on dirait une bêta mal finie, vendue tarif classique comme si tout allait bien (25€ ça va quand même, mais c'est le prix d'un jeu complet quand même). Dès les premières parties, tu te prends bugs sur bugs : les curseurs qui restent bloqués, les déplacements qui sont rigides, le ballon qui glisse sans logique…

Et pourtant, le jeu est 100 % multijoueur. Tu l’achètes pour jouer en ligne, pas en solo, mais t’as pas de mode entraînement, pas d’histoire, rien. Même pas un minimum de personnalisation de ton joueur, tu joues avec un modèle basique comme en 2006. C’est pauvre en contenu, surtout pour un jeu qui mise tout sur le compétitif.

Mais alors, le gardien, parlons-en.
C’EST UNE BLAGUE. UN MUR MAGIQUE.
IL TP LA BALLE SUR LUI, il te la vole alors qu’elle est à un mètre, même quand t’es seul face au but. Tu te démènes pour construire une action propre, et au final c’est toujours la même chose : le gardien se transforme en super-héros et te casse tout. Et parfois, il bug totalement et laisse passer un ballon ridicule (souvent de mon coté d'ailleurs, genre quand je joue elle se tp pas dans mes mains ?). Donc non seulement c’est cheaté, mais en plus c’est incohérent.

En parties classique, c’est la cour de récré. T’as que des mecs qui se prennent pour le Blue Lock (Bachira, Kaiser, Rin, Barou, etc...), qui dribblent tout seul alors que le jeu est censé être collectif. Personne ne fait de passe, les défenseurs montent et perdent la balle, les attaquants perde la balle car pas de passes… Résultat ? Tu perds à cause de coéquipiers qui jouent leur propre match.

Et puis les bugs, encore et toujours :
Tacles qui passent à travers le ballon
Ballon qui reste bloqué sans raison
Buts accordés alors qu’ils ne sont jamais rentrés
Serveurs avec 150ms de ping et des ballon qui se TP

Puisque je suis sympa, voilà des points positifs :

- Type de jeu encore nouveau, qui mérite d’être mis en avant et d’être joué !
- Graphismes qui ont leur style, il faudrait certes les améliorer, mais ils ont un style graphique, et ça, j’aime beaucoup !
- Les musiques ont un bon style, mais SVP, ajoutez-en plus.

Conclusion : le jeu pourrait être une pépite, et franchement JE L’ESPÈRE POUR LUI ! Mais là il est cassé de partout. Si les devs ne se réveillent pas rapidement, ça va juste devenir un jeu oublié de plus. Et ce sera très dommage, parce qu’il mérite mieux. Mais à l’heure actuelle ? C’est un chaos contrôlé par un gardien divin et des bugs à chaque match.

PS : sa fait quelques mois mtn, donc précisément le 17/08/2025, et le jeu est encore pire, vous foutez quoi ? 

Update de ce jeu qui restons poli est bien explosé au sol / éclaté : on est le 17/10/2025, toujours rien de bon, tout est langue, pas mal les 45ms sur les serveurs, pourtant situé en Europe, juste pour savoir, c'était quand le dernier bout de code que vous avez fait, sûrement au début de la bêta, ensuite les PRIORITÉS SONT À REVOIR, les décalages sur les balles et actions des persos, et surtout mon perso quifait une T-POSE au milieu d'une animation, ça n'es pas arrivé une fois non, a chaque match, donc si vous souhaitez faire de l'E-Sport, laisser moi rire, aucun potentiel, il est mort au début de la sortie officiel !

Update du 19/01/2026
Je reviens sur le jeu, je pensais pouvoir passé un bon moment avec mes potes, en me disant : Le jeu a du être mis a jour, les bugs devrais être parties, quel fut ma surprise quand je découvre, que non seulements les même bug son encore sur le jeu depuis la dernière fois (17/10/2025 comme inscrit au dessus), mais en plus les priorités sont encore pires qu'avant, j'ai des bugs de sensibilité avec le curseurs de la souris, bref, je trouve que ce jeu est une honte, il faudrait sois faire un effort, sois vous recyclé, bref, je désinstalle, et je ne remonte pas de points positifs comme les 10 dernières update de mon évaluation

Şahsıma ulaşan, kaynaklarını henüz açıklayamadığım özel ve gizli bir istihbarat almış bulunmaktayım. Bu istihbarata göre oyunun oluşma fikrini Üçüncü Dünya Ülkeleri yapımcı şirkete vermiş. Zaten kazandıkları üç kuruşun ikisini buna harcayan Üçüncü Dünya Ülkelerinin amacı ise net: evrimin %100 oranda başarılı olamadığı maymun evlatları. Bu sayede bütün bu zina tohumlarını dünyadan temizlemek ve kendi ülkelerini İkinci veya Birinci Dünya Ülkeleri arasında görmek istiyorlar, yani gelişmek istiyorlar. Bu oyunun bu plandaki rolü de işte tam burada ortaya çıkıyor. Bütün bu maymun evlatlarını en hızlı ve en yüksek oranda bir araya getirmek ve imha etmek. Maalesef benim gibi beynini kullanabilen insanlar gibi istisnalar var fakat bu sizi kandırmasın! Oyunu geliştirdiği gelişmiş bir yapay zeka var. Benim gibileri ve maymun evlatlarını ayırt edebiliyor. Yoksa başka türlü art arda bu kadar orospu evladını nasıl benim olduğum takıma denk getirecek?! Başta bunun takımdaki ıq seviyesinin eşitlenmesi için olduğunu düşünüyordum ama yanılmışım. Orospu evlatlarını imha edecekler!!! Siz siz olun kendinize kaybediyorum diye kızmayın. Mesela ben bugün gold 1 olacak iken bi' baktım gold 3 olmuşum. Ama gram sinirli veya öfkeli değilim. Çünkü benim seçilmiş kişi olduğumu biliyorum ve bunun refahıyla birlikte keyifle oyunu oynuyorum.

Pros:
Addictive gameplay – once you start, it’s hard to stop.

Solid optimization – no major performance issues during my playtime.

Great concept – fresh take on competitive gaming.

Intense matches – games often go down to the wire.

Tactical depth – strategy and coordination are key and rewarding.

Amazing with friends – playing with a full team is where the game truly shines.

Good foundation – the core gameplay feels polished and has real potential.

Cons:
No “Rematch” button – ironically, despite the name, there’s no way to instantly rematch after a game.

Occasional crashes – the game crashed twice over 30 hours; not terrible, but still worth noting.

Solo play isn’t great – without a team, the experience suffers due to lack of coordination.

Solo players often ruin games – competitive 3v3 or 4v4 with proper matchmaking would help a lot.

No in-game friend system – adding friends directly in-game would make team play much easier.

Needs more content – more game modes and variety would go a long way, though this might just be a matter of time.

Le jeu est optimisé avec le cul, des bugs par-ci par-là, comme par le fait de ne plus DU TOUT pouvoir prendre la balle a ses pieds, qu'on soit gardien ou non, ce qui prive tout simplement la personne affectée de jouer.
Sans parler des parties classées, où tu peux te retrouver aléatoirement déconnecté de ta partie, mais tout va bien n'est-ce pas ? Car il existe une fonctionnalité qui vous permet de vous reconnecter pour éviter la pénalité !
Eh bien non, puisque cette fonction ne marche tout simplement jamais ! Ce qui a alors plusieurs effets sur votre compte (et votre humeur, qui sait cela vient peut-être de m'arriver à l'instant) tout d'abord vous écoperez d'une pénalité vous empêchant de lancer n'importe quel mode multijoueur pendant une période un peu trop longue sachant que ça n'est même pas de VOTRE faute en premier lieu.
Deuxièmement, la partie vous sera automatiquement comptée comme une défaite, même si vous meniez de 3 buts sur l'adversaire ! ce qui est extrêmement frustrant puisque vous verrez alors votre rang classé si durement gagné descendre sans que vous ne puissiez rien faire, peut importe l'intensité que vous y mettrez.
Sans oublier nos chers équipiers qui vont alors vous haïr car vous les avez surement condamnés à une défaite, et là est le problème, si ça n'est pas vous qui en êtes victime c'est une autre personne de l'équipe, c'est une boucle et vous ne pouvez rien y faire. 
En 122h de jeu l'optimisation du jeu m'a plus frustré que n'importe quel de mes 700 matchs et je n'abuse absolument pas, le jeu est dans cet état depuis plusieurs mois maintenant mais aucun patch n'est publié, et si ce bug ne ruine pas votre partie et votre envie de jouer, un autre bug le fera.

Hay juegos que te atrapan. Otros que simplemente están ahí. Rematch, en cambio, te empuja suavemente hacia la puerta de salida mientras te susurra: “lo intenté, ¿vale?”.

El balón, por su parte, tiene el comportamiento de un electrón indeciso: jamás sabrás si va a subir, bajar o salirse del universo.
—porque hay una, en teoría— rebota cuando quiere, vuela cuando no debe y a veces simplemente desaparece porque también tiene derecho a rendirse.

No hay progresión real, ni sensación de logro, ni una chispa de "quiero jugar otra". El nombre Rematch insinúa que querrás otra ronda. Mentira. Lo que quieres es desinstalar y llamar a un terapeuta.

Jugar Rematch es como ver un tráiler que promete acción, velocidad y emoción… y luego encontrarte en una sala de espera con un carrito de golf oxidado y una pelota de yoga que no coopera.

遊戲本質很好,確實可以體驗足球,沒有像其他遊戲一樣課金.但是還有更多可以改進的地方,
先說遊戲性方面,目前的控球還有撲救判定十分之不明確,在接近40多小時的遊戲過程中,出現了至少十多次,龍門出現了動畫,手也已經抓住了皮球,但是系統判定入球,而且在重播的時候,也顯示到球被龍門彈出,像撞到牆壁一樣彈了出來,令人感到十分無奈.
控球方面,經常出現到對方球員在後面剷球,明明沒有剷中,也已經穿過了人物模型,但仍然能擋到射門,在最近更加出現了一些漏洞是無法控到球,隊友傳球之後,球直接穿過人物模型,就算主動走過去,系統也無法判定.
至於遊戲玩家素質簡直是頂級,有一些玩家懷疑看教學的時候只有看射門,傳球什麼的完全不懂,疊瓦式,三角傳球,這些進攻方式我也不強求,遊戲本身也有很多不同的進攻,例如撞牆,但是這些隊友根本就完全不傳,更有甚者完全不會防守,只會站在前面一直在需要球需要球,而當遇到這些消極的隊友的時候,作為一個遊戲玩家當然想舉報,但貴公司的遊戲舉報機制竟然是傳送我到他的steam主頁,請問這有什麼用?我能舉報什麼?而且貴公司的遊戲匹配更是頂級,我一個白金一可以排到對面有兩個大師,還是對面認為我打得好的時候,邀請我一起玩在steam聊天才知道,有什麼公平?而且雙方排位的訊息不明確,有些人的實力實在無法想像他是白金,希望貴公司可以改善到遊戲匹配機制,雙方排位訊息,判定問題,總體來說其實玩得很高興,作為一個足球愛好者,FIFA,PES,FM甚至乎現實我都有踢球,我實在很希望有一款足球遊戲可以體驗到真實的足球,不是靠課金,當然我希望這款遊戲就是我希望的,批評不一定全是壞的,批評的人都是愛這遊戲的人,Keep working and good luck

The core concept of the game is very good. In an under-developed modern arcade sport game market, REMATCH will probably stay towards the top for a while. The game gives  a combination of the old school arcade sport games (nba jam, mario strikers), modern arcade sport games (rocket league) and fighting game interactions all mixed in. This combination makes the loop of matchmaking a very addicting experience.

However, you should not buy this game currently if you're looking for a highly-competitive game with a lot of depth, it's way too early for that. The graphic performance feels heavily under-optimized, every goal will make you question if your game is crashing when your FPS goes to 0. The netcode will make you feel like you're playing a competitive fighting game with a highly volatile ping and massive rollback frames. The player-on-player interactions and priority system (tackles, GK priority, etc) amplifies the bad netcode and hinders the potential for a competitive game. Player interactions such as cross-defense, passing animations, and tackling animations lead to atypical correct plays.

"Rematch" é um jogo de futebol que se propõe a reinventar a forma como os fãs interagem com o esporte dentro do universo dos games. Lançado com uma proposta ambiciosa, ele tenta equilibrar a jogabilidade arcade com elementos táticos profundos e personalização de narrativa, dando ao jogador mais do que apenas partidas de 90 minutos. A ideia central do jogo é reviver confrontos clássicos do futebol ou criar novos cenários alternativos — os chamados “e se...?” — com desfechos diferentes dos reais, permitindo reescrever a história do esporte.
O nome "Rematch" (revide ou revanche) não é à toa. O jogo gira em torno de confrontos históricos, sejam reais ou fictícios. Os jogadores podem escolher reviver finais de Copa do Mundo, clássicos nacionais ou até partidas icônicas de clubes e mudar o rumo da história. Por exemplo: E se o Brasil tivesse vencido a Alemanha em 2014? Ou E se a final da Champions de 2005 tivesse terminado com a vitória do Milan?

Essa proposta narrativa é um dos diferenciais mais marcantes do jogo. Ele mescla gameplay com storytelling, usando elementos de documentário esportivo, narração dinâmica e até cutscenes cinematográficas com personagens reais ou inspirados em atletas históricos.
Sistema de Controle Responsivo: Os comandos são intuitivos, mas oferecem profundidade. O jogador casual pode jogar bem com o básico, enquanto os avançados têm camadas extras como passes táticos, controle manual da defesa e variações estratégicas.

IA Adaptativa: Os adversários aprendem com o estilo de jogo do player. Se você insistir demais em jogadas pelas laterais, a IA começa a fechar espaços ali, obrigando você a mudar de abordagem.

Modos de Jogo: Além dos modos padrão (Amistoso, Carreira, Online), o destaque vai para o "Modo História", onde você revive partidas clássicas ou hipotéticas com objetivos específicos — como reverter um placar nos últimos 10 minutos, ou marcar um gol com um jogador histórico.

Edição de Cenários: Há um modo criativo onde o jogador pode montar o próprio cenário fictício, escolhendo elenco, clima, torcida, regras especiais e até manipular eventos históricos para criar confrontos únicos.
Curva de Aprendizado: Para quem busca uma experiência arcade rápida, alguns modos são complexos demais. O excesso de opções táticas e de personalização pode afastar o jogador casual.

Arbitragem Inconsistente: Um problema recorrente são decisões arbitrárias duvidosas, como pênaltis mal marcados ou faltas leves que geram cartões — algo que, embora realista, pode ser frustrante pela falta de padrão.

Servidores Online (em algumas versões): Em determinados momentos do dia, o jogo sofre com instabilidades nos modos multiplayer, especialmente no matchmaking.
"Rematch" entrega gráficos impressionantes — com expressões faciais detalhadas, movimentações realistas e ambientes dinâmicos. A iluminação muda conforme o horário da partida, e os torcedores têm reações variadas dependendo do contexto da jogada.

As cutscenes nos modos históricos são especialmente bem produzidas, com um tom cinematográfico que aproxima o game de uma série da Netflix sobre futebol.
A narração é um show à parte. Há vozes em diferentes idiomas (com destaque para inglês, espanhol e português), com comentários específicos para cada cenário histórico. Isso adiciona imersão e valor emocional aos confrontos.

A trilha sonora varia entre músicas inspiradoras nos menus e silêncio dramático durante decisões importantes nas partidas, o que reforça a tensão.
"Rematch" não quer ser apenas mais um jogo de futebol. Ele se posiciona como uma experiência futebolística interativa, onde a emoção do esporte é tão importante quanto o placar. Ao misturar tática, história, narrativa e jogabilidade refinada, o jogo ocupa um espaço inédito entre simulador e obra interativa.
A comunidade do jogo é bastante ativa. Muitos jogadores compartilham cenários criados, recriações históricas, mods com uniformes clássicos e até ligas alternativas. O sistema interno de upload/download de conteúdo facilita isso, incentivando a criatividade coletiva.
O jogo é ideal para:

Fãs hardcore de futebol e história do esporte.

Jogadores que valorizam narrativa e contexto, além de gameplay.

Criadores de conteúdo que gostam de storytelling esportivo.

Quem busca uma alternativa mais emocional e envolvente do que FIFA ou eFootball.
"Rematch" é um projeto ambicioso que mistura nostalgia, interatividade e profundidade tática. Ele não tenta competir diretamente com os grandes simuladores de futebol, mas sim oferecer algo que eles não têm: a capacidade de reviver e reescrever a história do esporte com um toque emocional e cinematográfico.

Apesar de alguns problemas técnicos e uma curva de aprendizado mais íngreme que o normal, é um jogo com alma — e isso é raro no gênero.

⭐ Nota Final: 8,8 / 10

The fact that a multiplayer game like Rematch launched without crossplay in 2025 is honestly inexcusable.

I get that implementing new features, especially those that affect multiplayer infrastructure, can be complex and challenging. Making sure everything runs smoothly at launch, across different systems, without causing unforeseen issues is not easy. I respect that.

But we’re not talking about some niche indie title. This is a fast-paced, casual multiplayer game in the vein of Rocket League or Fortnite, where community size and accessibility are everything.

Crossplay should be a standard, not a “maybe later” feature - ESPECIALLY for a game like this. Splitting the player base across platforms at launch (in 2025!!) only hurts everyone.. players, matchmaking, and the longevity of the game.

I really hope this gets addressed soon, because this is the kind of issue that, if not fixed within the next month or two, can kill the game’s momentum right out of the gate.

I only played three matches in this game and saw everything I needed to see.  This game is incredibly underbaked. Avevo grandi aspettative per Rematch, ma la delusione è stata forte.
Il concept è valido: un calcio arcade, veloce e basato sulla skill individuale, ma l'esperienza è rovinata da troppi problemi.

I principali difetti:

Connessioni instabili: lag, disconnessioni e matchmaking lento rendono frustrante anche solo iniziare una partita.

Niente crossplay: nel 2025 è inaccettabile lanciare un gioco multiplayer senza cross-platform.

Controlli poco reattivi: il sistema di passaggi e tiri è più caotico che tecnico, con animazioni spesso fuori sync.

Ricompense nulle: grindare per sbloccare oggetti inutili o skin poco ispirate toglie ogni senso di progressione.

Poche modalità: mancano sfide offline, tornei, personalizzazione della squadra. Tutto sembra un early access, ma al prezzo di un gioco completo.

My review is still firmly negative, but I want to leave a short note for the developers and the Sloclap team. I think they still deserve some credit for the game they’ve made. The game can be very enjoyable in the best-case scenarios, and it’s clear the team has worked hard to address issues as they came up. The problem is that, despite their efforts, it’s still far from enough. After all this time, it seems that the real issue isn’t just about bugs or specific interactions, but rather the game’s very design, which simply won’t ever allow for a truly smooth experience.

So what’s wrong with Rematch?

- Interactions with the ball are still catastrophic. As soon as several players try to contest the ball at the same time, the game can’t keep up—and in a football game, that’s… often.

- Action priority is just as unpredictable for the same reason. If two players go for the ball, figuring out who gets it first is more art than science—and sometimes one of them is just completely ignored by the system.

- Defensive actions like tackles sometimes work… and sometimes don’t. The tackle lands, the opponent stumbles, but the ball just keeps rolling like nothing happened. Or the tackle simply doesn’t register at all, even when clearly on target in the replay cams. And when you concede 3 goals per match because of this…

- Distances between the player and the ball are… relative. You’ll very often see players snap to the ball even when they were behind you.

- Trajectories are just as relative: sometimes a player standing directly in the path of the ball will be phased through, other times they’ll be considered in the way and stop it.

- Collisions between the ball, players, and posts are things the server simply doesn’t know how to handle. A ball hitting a player who can’t catch it will rebound in some random direction on the same side… And it’s the same with posts: the ball will bounce randomly around the post, sometimes even into the goal in ways that make zero physical sense.

- The meta is boring to death. The so-called “missile” meta just boils down to blasting the ball hard into the box to trigger an interaction conflict between a teammate glued to the keeper and the keeper himself… half the time the attacker wins priority and it’s a goal.

- Exploits and ball abuse keep multiplying, and when one disappears, another pops up. You’ll constantly see players pulling off ball movements the game was never designed for, which the devs try (unsuccessfully) to prevent. With every new patch, you’ll find fresh videos of even more ridiculous exploits.

- Exploits and ball abuse are basically the entire game once you hit a certain ranking. When you reach master/elite ranks, you’ll see players doing nothing but chaining exploits to keep control of the ball and score.

- Servers are still a mess. With every patch, there’s a new issue—sometimes short-lived, sometimes lasting—keeping you from logging in, launching the game, starting matches, or inviting teammates.

I’ve had some amazing nights on Rematch with friends, full of laughs, but just as many nights of pure frustration. Don’t buy the game. If you really want to play it, wait another year or two until it’s actually cooked… Hopefully the problems don’t come from the game’s core architecture but rather from solvable issues that the devs—who are clearly doing their best—might one day fix.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Systématiquement des problèmes de connexion, des balles qui se téléportent, des actions qui se freeze en attendant un tacle. Des déconnexions intempestives.

Je ne recommande définitivement pas d'acheter ce jeu. Même s'il vaut son prix, il est actuellement injouable. C'est déjà très discutable de devoir caler ses heures de jeux pour ne pas tomber sur les "peak hours" où tous le monde joue et éviter les lags, mais même aujourd'hui 18h c'est injouable. C'est un jeu payant, rappelons le. Payer pour ne pas pouvoir jouer à cause de problèmes de connexion est véritable frustrant et indigne... Surtout après que le jeu ai eu le droit à une bêta pour mettre l'activité et la réponse serveur à l'essai.

Recommandation qui évoluera quand la chose sera patch, j'imagine, si j'ai la foi de retourner y jouer.

Habeis visto el anime Blue lock? pues esto es el juego xD todos son delanteros llenos de ego, chupones que piensan que son los mejores hasta el portero xD, pasar la pelota para hacer juego bonito esta penalizado si no conoces a tu compañero porque fallará mas que una escopeta de feria y en el caso que marque un tanto pensará que es merito suyo xD

Para mi es un juegazo, donde te sientes un verdadero jugador, sin facilidades como el FIFA, aqui si eres bueno se nota y si eres malo todavia mas.

Puntos en contra.
-jugadores toxicos (dejan de ser porteros porque no les gusta y abandona la porteria para que otro ocupe su lugar, o mete goles a propia puerta etc)
-abandonares de partidas, esta lleno en cuanto te meten 2 goles huyen,mas de una vez hemos ganado siendo menos
-chupones, no bajan a defender ni aunque sea el punto decisivo, entenderia que si son los crack y siempre meten goles se quedara ahi, pero muchos son paquetes.
-El control del portero cuesta acostumbrarse yo soy incapaz de hacer paradas cortas, si saltas saltas entero cuando quieres un poquito.
-la camara con el mando a veces te traiciona un monton, que no sabes ni donde esta la pelota o giras muy rapido o giras muy lento.
-Falta contenido aun

Puntos a favor
-Steam deck, va de lujo, sin estar penalizado como otros juegos por el anticheat, tampoco pierdes tanta calidad grafica por lo que se agradece
-cuando encuentras jugadores que saben jugar en equipo es una gozada
-Para mi es el juego mas realista que hay hasta la fecha, siendo arcade, te hace sentir cuando juegas con tus amigos en la playa, donde encuentras a tu amigo chupon, el manco, el que le gusta hacer palomitas de portero, etc 
-Es un juego individual con compañeros como la vida misma, asi que menos llorar los que vienen de FIFA
-El control cuando te haces con el y sale como tu quieres es una gozada

Puntos a mejorar.
-Penalizadores a jugadores que son toxicos, en el sentido que se van de la partida, que huyen de la porteria, que no salen del area de ataque como buen chupon, los que se meten goles a propia a puerta a drede
-control del portero
-mas florituras
-mas puntuaciones si eres defensa te comes los mocos y pareces que no hagas nada, lo mismo con el portero, solo recibes punto si atrapas la pelota, y si no te chutan te mueres del asco, yo he estado 4 minutos de portero que no bajaban y cuando bajan me meten un golazo...muy triste si...
-más contenido de personalizar tanto goles, como el personaje (mas peinados por dios) pose de victorias etc, mas estadio y ojala en un futuro climatologia como lluvia y se note el efecto

Inutile de se précipiter sur le jeu, du moins pas sur la ranked. On voit bien que les devs n'ont pas l'expérience des jeux multijoueurs compétitifs car le matchmaking est tout simplement inexistant. Soit vous tombez 100x avec les mêmes joueurs (comme si il n'y avait pas 70.000 joueurs par jour sur le jeu), soit vous tombez avec des joueurs qui ont simplement 4x votre rang (car oui, si vous êtes platine admettons, vous pouvez tomber avec des joueurs élite dans le plus grand des calmes). Il n'y a pas de système d'élo, vous gagnez +20 points, et en perdez -17 systématiquement, donc... bizarre.

Idem, n'essayez pas de jouer au jeu si vous êtes seul. A l'instar de tous les autres jeux compétitifs sur Terre, celui-là exige d'être jouer avec des teammates que vous connaissez. Un, deux ou trois minimum, car sinon le jeu est un véritable enfer à tous les plans. Tout le monde part en attaque pour se la jouer perso comme Ben Arfa, les joueurs quittent dès qu'un goal est encaissé, et je vous passe la quantité de comportement toxique auxquels on peut faire face car la liste est longue.

Evidemment, il n'y a aucun moyen de signaler les joueurs, et idem, il n'y a aucune sanction de possible sur le jeu (bien qu'il est affirmé le contraire quand vous quittez une partie). C'est littéralement un terrain vague où tous les comportements sont tolérés, sans que rien ne puisse être fait.

Pas de roadmap relayée par les devs, rien. Le battlepass se divise en 3 étapes, et une étape prend quelques petites heures de jeu avant d'être compléter, du coup vous devez attendre 15 jours/1 mois pour débloquer la prochaine étape et les quelques maigres cosmétiques qu'elle vous propose.

Autrement, le jeu est fun, bien que redondant à un moment donné, donc éviter de trop spam le jeu ! En revanche beaucoup de bugs, beaucoup de desynch et de crashs qui rendent l'expérience un peu ennuyante à la longue. J'ai joué aux deux vagues de betas précédent la sortie du jeu, et je peux vous dire qu'il n'y avait vraiment pas autant de bug, ce qui est assez surprenant... Mais de ce que j'ai compris ils travaillaient à résoudre tous ces problèmes, donc je suppose que ça va.

Il y a un mode "libre" pour s'entraîner, et pour le coup c'est vraiment un bon point, car on peut s'entraîner à plusieurs, faire des matchs amicaux, etc... Il manque plus que l'intégration des bots pour mettre en place des scénarios d'attaque/défense et ce serait super.

Le système de customisation des personnages est simple mais bien réalisé et suffisant. On peut tout modifier sur son personnage, ses cheveux, couleur de peau, chaussures, protège-tibia, maillot, short, tête, etc. C'est super, et on peut vraiment faire des persos marrants avec une certaine liberté.

Enfin pour conclure, le jeu peut être vraiment fun à plusieurs, car il y a de belles mécaniques à développer pour produire un beau jeu d'équipe et tutti quanti. C'est satisfaisant par moment, mais comme vous avez pu le lire, y a un certain nombre de points négatifs que vous allez tout de suite ressentir si vous essayez de prendre le jeu au sérieux.

Je pense que le plus sage serait d'attendre quelques mois, peut-être même une année entière histoire d'avoir un jeu vraiment propre, surtout au niveau du compétitif car pour le moment y a vraiment que le strict minimum (pouvoir jouer au jeu).

The concept? Great.
The game? Really bad.

Putting aside the impossibility of having fun thanks to all the people who think they're playing alone, the game itself is, as a matter of fact, just bad:

- Game breaking bugs such as the impossibility to lock the ball on random games, crashes after goals, server-client desync and many many more;
- Contrasts do not exist, the game decides arbitrarily who gets the ball, and there's NOTHING you can do to avoid that;
- It's REALLY incomprehensible how sometimes you manage to catch the ball and other times it simply passes through you, very funny and not frustrating at all in all cases, but especially when you are the goalkeeper.
- Well -you may think- at least when you have the ball there's nothing, apart from other players, that could take it off. ABSOLUTELY NOT, even while you have the ball at your feet there can be a mystical force that randomly decides to let you forget the ball, because yes.

I'm not even close to listing all the issues with this game, it just feels (and is) too random and inconsistent, and it costs €25, TWENTY-FIVE EUROS, for a thing that is not even close to an alpha, it's really too much.


Do yourself a favor and don't buy it.

Rematch is a really good game, but if you don't have a team to play with like me, I wouldn't recommend buying it. There's voice chat in the game, so technically you can communicate with your team, but actually getting a coordinated team instead of a bunch of egotistical wannabe football stars is a miracle. I've also run into a lot of players who, instead of using voice chat properly, just scream into their mics or troll around.

There are no fouls or real rules in the game, which sounds fun at first because you can just play casually. But then you run into situations where someone from the enemy team camps in front of your goal the entire match, waiting for the goalkeeper to mess up. Or your own goalie refuses to pass and tries to dribble across the entire field just to score by himself.

Most teammates seem to play like it’s their first time touching a football. Some go AFK, others run around chasing the ball with no plan, and hardly anyone marks opponents or even tries to cooperate. It feels like everyone is doing their best to make the most chaotic plays possible.

During the beta, when the game was free, I usually got matched with players who at least had a basic idea of how to play. Now that it’s a paid game, it feels like all the worst players have taken over.

Matchmaking is completely unbalanced. You often end up against a team that knows what they’re doing, while your side is full of players who just stand still, ignore open passes, or choose to shoot from impossible angles. There's no system in place to encourage teamwork or punish people who ruin matches, which makes solo queuing frustrating and unrewarding.

If you have a group of friends to play with, Rematch can be a lot of fun. But if you're going in solo, prepare for chaos and disappointment.




Update: The more I play Rematch, the more I start to hate it. And to be clear — the game itself isn't the problem. The biggest issue is the player base.

In unranked matches, I constantly ended up with people who seemed like they'd never played football in real life or in a video game before — and Rematch was their first-ever contact with the sport in any form. I hoped things would get better in ranked, but they didn’t. I'm someone who barely follows real-life football, so I expected to be one of the least knowledgeable players — but judging by how most people in Rematch play, I feel like the most experienced person on the field.

Most teammates act like they’re Messi or Ronaldo, trying to carry the whole game on their own. Even when they’re surrounded by opponents, and there’s a teammate nearby ready for a clean pass, they’ll still try to score from midfield. Spoiler: not a single one of those “Messis” has ever actually scored.

Goalkeepers either just stand there like they’re being punished, letting balls fly in without reacting, or they randomly leave the goal wide open hoping someone else will cover for them — which no one ever does. Meanwhile, the enemy casually scores.

Aside from the players themselves, there's no way to report toxic or trolling behavior, and the reward system from the battle pass feels pretty underwhelming.

As it stands, I can’t recommend buying Rematch unless you have a dedicated group of friends to play with or you genuinely enjoy frustration. Like I said before, the game has great potential, but the developers really need to improve the matchmaking system, introduce proper reporting and punishment for disruptive players, and make changes to discourage selfish, solo-oriented play.

[list]
[h1]Positives[/h1]
[*]Easy to learn but hard to master. Deep and complex mechanics befitting a proper football game (precision, timing, calmness under pressure, off-the-ball, etc).

[*]Roles matter. Being a goalkeeper, defender, and attacker each has its own mastery to learn.

[*]Good stylized graphic, Sifu style.

[*]Matches are fast and insanely addicting. You'll always crave for that 'next match'.

[*]Very fun with friends.

[*]Intuitive controls (controller).

[*]Crossplay planned.

[*]Generous season pass. You can buy the next premium season pass using the premium currency gotten from the previous one.

[*]Teamwork MATTERS. Can't stress this enough. Passing is key, sprinting and dribbling will quickly tire you.

[*]Knowledge or experience of playing football are not explicitly required but it would help up your game in the higher levels.

[h1]Negatives[/h1]
[*]Woke. Female character models could be better.

[*]AVERAGE server tick rate or net code for a PVP-only game is inexcusable (biggest issue of the game IMO).

[*]Separate woke entry for vitiligo.

[*]Awful priority system. When an attacker goes for a header and the GK tries to catch the ball midair, would sometimes result in the ball going through the GK's hands. There are many similar cases like these involving the attacker using boost (extra effort). Playing as a dedicated GK is oft times frustrating.

[h1]Thoughts[/h1]
[*]Might be a bit pricey at first glance (I also thought so at first), but after playing, it justifies its price IMO. Where else can you play a game like this?

[*]If only they upgrade the servers' tick rate, the game would be P.

[*]The devs need to have good once over of the game's engine/ mechanics. Sliding tackle's hitbox is way too small, goalkeeper's dive should have uncontested priority over others, headers should win priority over volleys, most of the dribbling techniques looked and felt glitchy, etc.

[h1]Conclusion[/h1]
[*]The game we don't know we needed, but the devs might flop this one.
[/list]

Ich hoffe wirklich, dass die Entwickler dranbleiben, denn hier steckt viel Potenzial drin. Aber in seinem aktuellen Zustand fühlt sich Rematch noch nicht fertig an.

Unfortunately, I can't recommend the game at this point.
As a casual game, some players might find it briefly enjoyable, but if you're playing with a competitive mindset, the current gameplay is unfortunately a disaster. And I'm not even talking about teammates who won’t pass the ball:

Matches are plagued by frequent desyncs (teleporting balls, players tackling you without actually making contact).

In addition, essential features are missing—like a report function or proper keybinding customization (which is currently very limited).

It’s also not possible to choose between different types of passes. The current method is very hard to control with mouse and keyboard, since the pass is triggered automatically after a short delay. A better approach would be a charge mechanic, where holding down the button powers up the pass and releasing it executes the kick.

I’d definitely update this review to positive if these things get fixed—but honestly, I doubt that’s going to happen.

Rematch: un juego con mucho potencial, pero lejos de estar completo

Rematch es un juego realmente divertido y con una propuesta interesante, pero lamentablemente su estado actual deja mucho que desear. La experiencia se ve afectada por numerosos problemas técnicos: desconexiones constantes por fallas en los servidores, alto ping, pérdida de paquetes, y errores en la jugabilidad que fácilmente podrían clasificarse como bugs.

Además, el modo competitivo —que debería ser el corazón del juego— carece de penalizaciones para jugadores tóxicos o trolls. Puedes perder RP incluso si un compañero se desconecta, dejándote en desventaja numérica sin que el sistema lo compense. A esto se suma la ausencia de funciones básicas como historial de partidas, botones para formar equipo (team-up), o una forma efectiva de reportar o evitar a jugadores problemáticos.

A esto se suma el estado caótico de soloq, donde el 90% de los jugadores quiere ser el protagonista y jugar para sí mismo, mientras que el otro 10% solo intenta llenar los huecos como puede. Esto genera partidas desequilibradas, con una jugabilidad desorganizada que rara vez produce algo bueno o satisfactorio. El matchmaking sufre, y al final, todos terminan teniendo una mala experiencia.

Puede que estos detalles parezcan menores, pero afectan mucho la experiencia de juego, especialmente para quienes buscan algo competitivo y serio. No me malinterpreten: el juego tiene muchísimo potencial y momentos muy entretenidos. Pero da la sensación de que se invierte más tiempo en colaboraciones con Ronaldinho o Balenciaga que en mejorar los aspectos fundamentales que de verdad importan al jugador.

The game is very fun. The developers have created a football game that people who don't necessarily have an interest in football can be enticed to play and also enjoy. This should be widely praised, because FIFA/EA have had a stranglehold on this genre for far to long.

IF it wasn't as fun, I'd be more cautious of giving this a positive review.  Their is a lot of work that needs to be done & quickly.  It wasn't until I reflected on Rocket league, that it was made apparent to me how smooth netcode is for Rocket league compared to REMATCH.  This game can feel quite rough to play and losing a game because of desync is not a fun experience.  People may excuse a few weeks, but improvement will need to made.

Right now, I hope the developers take the next few weeks to really improve whats been built. Because otherwise I don't see this surviving the first few months and becoming a staple which Rocket league became for so many. I'd like for this to be a game that people can look at and say "I'll have fun on this" in a years time.

Obávám se, že hra může začít rychle umírat, pokud se brzo nezačnou zaměřovat na plnění obsahu do hry jako např. (Turnajový mod, Event mody, shop je taky prázdný, režim rankedů pro 3v3 nebo 4v4, Workshop mapy, MP training, atd....) Jako příklad uvedu Fall Guys, hra s podobnou cenovkou nedostala pořádný update 2 - 3 měsíce a lidi to přestalo bavit, pak přešli do F2P verze, což hře trošku pomohlo, ale stejně zase začala umírat. Od REMATCH očekávám, že přechod na F2P je až ve vzdálené budoucnosti.

A beautiful and fun game in the Rocket League style. My only problem is the issue of passing to my friend. The passing should be more fluid and not random. Other than that, there is nothing. All other things can be developed with time.

Out the gate, $30 is a high asking price for this style of game. Comparable titles are sometimes $15 and usually f2p. However, REMATCH is goated already. 
The game does lag and occasionally suffers from net code issues, maybe once very shortly every 3 games or so. There is also the uncommon issue of getting disconnected from the match for a short time period.
I've seen people complaining about goalie, not being able to dive diagonal, the ball going through you, etc. Well you can dive diagonal, and very rarely does that ball actually pass through you. Of course you will not save every shot from inside the box.
The game emphasizes both teamwork and individual skill. The skill ceiling is already high and continues to get higher. This is probably the most fun I've had in a competitive game playing with friends rather than randoms.  
The player base is currently full of those who have never even seen a football match and the quality of play from said players clearly suffers.
Just like all other steam review sections, it's filled with people who think they can all be Messi right off the rip and blame the game when they aren't. 

TLDR; The game has it's issues, but it's still good. Better with friends.

Awesome game! I'm not the type to actively play sports game but this one is something else! Easy to learn yet hard to master with a way to gradually play against stronger opponents. I would say the biggest downsides are the pratice mode that isn't fully fleshed out (can't restart it or have to go back to the menu) and the lack of crossplay.

This game should be in early access, because that's the current state of the game. With tons of lag, de-sync issues, and just general jank of this game. It's extremely frustrating to be unable to do specific actions because the ball doesn't get picked up even though you are on top of it. You stand in front of someone to block their shot and they shoot through you. A goalie definitely blocked a shot and it literally goes through their hands. I do not recommend this game to anyone in this current state for the price tag being asked for on top of the fact there is already a 'battle-pass' and micro-transactions. 

I asked for a refund even past my 2 hour mark because of just how frustrating it is to play this. INB4 glazers.

rematch isnt just another game: its a thrilling dive into a world where strategy meets adrenaline. The game brilliantly combines fast-paced action with deep tactical elements, making every match feel fresh and engaging. Weather your a seasoned gamer or new to the scene, rematch offers a uniquely rewarding experience that keeps you on the edge of your seat.
One of the standout features of rematch is its stunning visual design. The developers have crafted a vibrant and immersive environment that pulls you right into the heart of action. The fluid animations and dynamic effects make every battle a visual spectacle, enhancing the overall excitement.
In conclusion, rematch is a must-play for anyone looking for a game that combines stunning visuals, deep gameplay, and endless replayability. Its a true testament to the power of innovative game design and a shining example of what modern gaming can achieve. Prepare to be hooked from the first match!

--NO COMPRAR ESTE JUEGO-- -- ACTUALIZACION MAS ABAJO--

No jugar en LATAM, ahora si con la reseña, Un juego con mucho potencial, aun que la gran parte del desarrollo dentro del juego sea de pago ("juego como servicio"), pero siguen sin arreglar los servidores y bugs desde la beta y su la salida (ya hace 2 meses y contando desde que hago esta actualizacion de reseña), en especialmente en Latam los servidores, acostumbrate si no eres de brasil a jugar con mala conexion, da lo mismo el internet que tengas, te va a ir pesimo la conexion con el servidor, una pena la verdad, por que la idea era que fuera un juego competitivo y entretenido, pero ni las ranked las toco por que te van a culpar a ti (para que hablar de las casuales). Ahora No encuentro que sea necesario reportar a los jugadores por salirse de las partidas por casuales, pero si que terminara el partido con opcion de rendirse en equipo y si es 4v4 y queda un 2v4 termine antes por que el matchmaking es horrible cuando una partida está empezada, me refiero que que puede estar toda la partida con 1 menos, ya que algunas partidas son in jugables sobretodo contra brasileños donde los servidores le dan una ventaja absurda (no tengo nada con brasil ni los brasileños, esto es mas que nada hacia los desarrolladores). La culpa es de los desarrolladores en este caso y sus servidores que realmente lo pensaron muy mal en LATAM, solo por eso sigo sin recomendarlo.

Выбирайте клавомышь, прежде чем идти в ранкед рекомендую закрыть все челенжи, их немного. 
У клавомыши есть один маааааааленький нюанс: ВЫ НИКОГДА ♥♥♥♥♥ НЕ СМОЖЕТЕ ОТДАТЬ СКРЫТЫЙ ПАС ДАЖЕ НЕ МЕЧТАЙТЕ ♥♥♥♥♥ ПОТОМУ ЧТО ОН РЕГАЕТ АБСОЛЮТНО РАНДОМНОЕ НАПРАВЛЕНИЕ. Только по прямой перед собой не шевеля ни мышкой, ни стрейфы A D, только по взгляду камеры. Пасуйте на удар. Каждую игру, почти каждую игру Клавомышь Пас Момент (конечно же в твоей команде)
Дурные челы, которые пасуют только другу, в каждом 4м матче.
Дурные челы, которые не понимают концепцию паса и возвращения в оборону хотя бы для вида в каждом 2м матче.
Дурные челы, которые не могут посмотреть управление и нажимать хотя бы ctrl стоя на воротах в каждом 3м матче.
Дурные челы, которые пропустив 2 мяча начинают спамить эмоуты и забивать в свои ворота в каждом 10м матче. (ну может 20м)
Кому захочется поиграть, рекомендую заходить с настроем "не на корову играем", поскольку так называемые несовершенства игры быстро могут вас довести.

Надеюсь, игру будут успешно допиливать, но как сказал разработчик, студия у них маленькая. Наверно и многого ждать не стоит.

UPD: добрался до ранга золото и играть в игру стало приятнее просто потому, что в основном люди понимают, что делают в матче

Uma das maiores decepções da minha vida, eu acreditei que esse jogo ia dar certo, me esforcei pra virar proplayer e os krai... A player base do jogo já sumiu, pegar 5k de player em final de semana é um ultraje, NÃO COMPRE ESSE JOGO, ah não ser que você tenha tesão em ficar em 10 minutos de fila por partida. A única forma de esse jogo voltar a ter players é com ele ficando de graça, mas isso não duraria muito, pois as pessoas que jogariam ele de graça logo iriam notar o quanto isso é uma bomba e ele iria voltar a ser falido. Игра не стабильная, раз в несколько часов может быть вылет из игры. 
Частые рандомные отключения от сервера игроков твоей команды или противника, или тебя. 
Есть подозрения что античит не работает, так как 1 игрок бегал с бесконечной стаминой. 
Есть баги, скорее всего связаны с пингом, делал подкат, проехал сквозь мяч, и так несколько раз. 
Игра фановая, но кривая очень на данный момент.

UPD все еще дерьмовый неткод, мяч после удара может остаться на месте, при подсечке ты можешь тупо сквозь мяч проехать, если ты вратарь то во время прыжка на мяч он может пролететь сквозь тебя , при ударе в перед когда целишься в ворота  мяч может полететь в обратную сторону, в игре не работает античит (например бесконечная стамина) и тд, игра ужасна!

Вот уже наиграл 50 часов 95% из которых за вратаря. Игру на данный момент назвать играбельной сложно.
1. Высокий пинг из за которого ты заранее находишься в более проигрышной позиции, для такой игры это недопустимо. (телепортации союзников и противников норма дял этой игры)
2. периодические packet loss из за которых игра на время становится в принципе неиграбельной
3. та же проблема что и в CS, когда просчет исхода любого события производится и на компе и на сервере, часто возникают ситуации когда у тебя на компе ты уже схватил мяч (за вратаря) а потом через долю секунды мяч находится в ногах у нападающего и на серваке ты мяч не схватил т.е. сервак просчитал по своему.
4. Тупые недаработки интерфейса. Метка приземления мяча показана прям в игре и меет синий цвет. В игре есть синее поле.....Думайте
Сюда еще можно добавить тупую миникартукоторая показывает только ситуацию в радиусе метров 10
5. Могу еще сказать про вылеты по вине сервака и по вине движка, но со временем таких ситуаций стало гораздо меньше
6. Нет возможности ролевого поиска в рейтинге (хотя бы просто галочка "я вратарь" "я не вратарь")
я не умею, не тренируюсь и не хочу играть в роли нападения или защитника. Так схуяли я должен попадать в катку в которой у тебя в команде будет 3 вратаря

O Rematch é genuinamente divertido e tem um potencial interessante. A jogabilidade me lembrou bastante dos bons tempos do Futebol Mania, conseguindo capturar aquela essência de futebol arcade que funciona bem.

Porém, existem alguns problemas significativos que afetam a experiência. O sistema de matchmaking é inconsistente - quando você joga solo, normalize encontrar jogadores que abandonam partidas ou trollam. O que torna isso ainda mais frustrante é que raramente entra um substituto, e não há sistema de bots para equilibrar os times. Isso resulta em muitas partidas desequilibradas.

O conceito de qualquer jogador poder ser goleiro é interessante, mas prejudica a competitividade em partidas mais sérias. Seria benéfico ter um sistema de posições definidas, especialmente no modo ranqueado, para elevar o nível estratégico do jogo. Um modo livre ou arcade separado funcionaria melhor para essa mecânica.

Os servidores não estão bons - travamentos, desync entre jogadores, quedas de conexão e rollbacks da bola acontecem com frequência.

Apesar dessas limitações, o jogo tem uma base sólida e diversão garantida. Acredito que com as correções necessárias, principalmente no matchmaking e estabilidade dos servidores, o Rematch vai melhorar muito.
