Pretty ambitious game for small team, considering how much maintenance this type of game needs. But I can't recommend it because :

The game is missing some standard multiplayer features, such as report and mute button, crossplay and [b]ranked does not pair you with people of the same rank and the ball desyncs no matter what server you are on.[/b] 

This game should have been early access, this is NOT a finished product and it does not matter if the developer team is small. YOU have chosen a difficult to manage type of game expecting esport, and you should have accounted for this before charging ANYBODY money without atleast early access.

The gameplay itself has very solid foundation, and with some work could become more fun. Defence feels clunky, slide sometimes does not have collision with the ball and after 26 hours the jumping (header, on Q button) is disappointing.

The priority of actions is puzzling basically the last action for the ball actually does something, defensive stance does not pickup balls making the switching between normal play a chore, sliding can trip you even at the end of the slide when it's supposed to lose momentum. Tackling is weird, you can tackle someone near a wall to the ground and they still will get the ball because THERE IS NO OUT OF BOUNDS IN A SOCCER GAME (This leads to passing across the walls, creating unending combo of volleys which are clunky. They snap to the ball and its very hard to counter or catch it as GK.)


Sound design very good and sountrack is fine, but I find myself just playing my own music because it's not too exciting.

And last thing, the customisation and characters.

It could be optimized to less tabs and less clicks you have to go through. Honestly, get rid of the tabs, they are such a friction. 

You can't rotate your character in customisation, so you'll have to guess how the hair looks behind the character.

The characters are "sharp", so expect sharp cheekbones and be disappointed because bodytypes and faces are very NEUTRAL. That means, if you're looking for specific gender you'll be disappointed, especially a woman. Unless, you want creature with noodles for legs. Honestly, the design for women is terrible and for men it's very generic. To put it bluntly, the characters are ugly.


Most importantly though, this game has the biggest echo chamber of a community and it's just released, count me out from this.

It's got that addictive quality that Rocket League has. The gameplay foundation is really, really fun.

Unfortunately, the community that this game once had at launch is no longer present, and gamers have moved on. It was fun while it lasted, and Sloclap really have cooked something really unique and fun. It just doesn't have the retention power that other multiplayer behemoths have to keep players coming back and playing daily for.

It's fun for a short while. There are a few problems with the game tho. 

1. No Anticheat. Already saw the first speedhackers. 
2. There is no chat, block function and voicechat has no push to talk. The quickchat options are few and not much helpful. 
3. There is no fun arcade mode and i think 3v3 would have been the better choice for Ranked because it's not easy to get 4 friends to play at the same time. 
4. There are a few gamebreaking bugs. One of them is the game ignores for the whole game your game inputs. The second one is the game lets you walk around, but you cant touch the ball. The only thing you can do is shoot it the moment u are near the ball. If you try to dribble or be the goalkeeper, the ball will phase through you.
5. The game feels not like a finished product, more like early access game. I'm sure the game gets better with future patches.
I have no idea how the game will do long term, but right now the moment to moment gameplay is some of the most fun I've had in any competitive multiplayer game in years!

The core gameplay is nearly flawless. It feels meticulously balanced, with a high skill ceiling. The team play feels amazing and you're rewarded for playing smart over individual skill. It's super addicting and easy to jump in for a few matches. I've never played soccer in real life, but found myself learning actual soccer positioning and strategy in order to improve in this game - which is pretty sick!!

It would be a perfect game if it was wrapped nicely. Unfortunately it had a rough launch (though the crashes and bugs seem mostly fixed now), and there are still plenty of other issues they'll hopefully address: a barebones ranked system, bugged achievements, lackluster customization, and unintuitive UI/UX. It's also pretty riddled with microtransactions, but most things are unlockable through fairly generous free currency.

Regardless, if you can put up with those flaws, you're in for one of the most fun multiplayer games out there

First let me state the good things:
- Very fun to play with friends
- Tactical aspect in 5v5 is nice
- The tutorial is good enough
- Stadiums and Visuals in general are very nice
- The game loop is very cool
- Competitive ranks are nice too
- The mechanical aspect is decent
- Devs are making constant updates and that's always good

Now why I can't recommend the game FOR NOW:
- Servers are ♥♥♥♥
- Gameplay is VERY LAGGY and DE-SYNC happens A LOT
- Dribble Mechanics feel weird, when you controll the ball it kills your momentum.
- Collisions feel weird, ball bounces all over the place and then teleports to one player
- Too many bugs make you lose a lot of matches (i.e. opponents score and their goalie has the ball on kickoff)
- Controls can't be mapped yet

My recommendations:
- Goalkeeper could be better, let us controll where we want to dive in more directions not just left-right but diagonals too
- Dribbles should not kill your momentum, unless you do them backwards,
- Add fast dribbles like fakes, step-overs, elastics, things like that would be cool
- Defender tackles are very spammable, you should get more penalized for a ground tackle
- Latency affects the game a lot, maybe add more server locations if you can
- Make the mercy rule on a bigger diff than 4? or remove it? matches are very short so I don't really see a point for it, at least in ranked
- Main menus need a UX improvement, it's hard to find things some times

When the game plays as intended, it's great. However, I cannot ignore the game's frequent poor performance. I have experienced at least 5 instances of the game crashing, and have lost count of the instances of desync. At one point, I made a well-timed standing tackle, only for the game to continue on as if the ball is in motion, while all I am able to see is a dead ball, leading to our time being scored on. It completely ruins my enjoyment of the game.

Similar games such as Rocket League launched as a more complete package along with significantly better performance. Until these issues are fixed, I cannot recommend this game to anyone and will never consider spending any extra money on season passes and cosmetics.

Joué à la béta, les problèmes survenus lors de celle ci sont toujours présents et parfois en pire. 
-Lags du ballon, des déplacements et des joueurs en match
-Déconnexion du serveur très fréquentes
-Rollback des actions en plein match
-Bug dans un lobby a plusieurs joueurs, rédemarrage du jeu nécessaire pour relancer une partie
-Aucun nouveau contenu (même moins qu'à la seconde béta) ajouté au jeu
-Les gens qui jouent à ce jeu n'ont, de toute évidence, pas 100% de l'usage de leur cerveau
-Gardiens OP avec le ballon aimanté dans les gants, le fait de pouvoir sauter plusieurs fois d'affilée sans cooldown
-Toxicité des joueurs en chat vocal sans possibilité de signaler le comportement en jeu ou dans le chat

Le jeu en l'état n'est pas terminé et ne vaut pas son prix, même si le gameplay est très agréable, tous les problèmes cités au dessus entachent l'experience de jeu et n'encouragent a revenir dessus.
Mises a jour de contenu et surtout de problèmes serveurs NECESSAIRES.

Mon ami Virgile et moi avions le choix entre les cercle des enfers, et le vocal de rematch pour au final me rendre compte que l'un n'était que le miroir de l'autre.
Gourmandise, avarice et colère seraient les péchés des individus jouant a ce jeu, bien souvent seul surement abandonné a cause de leur causticité par leur pairs, ou simplement a la naissance pour ce que j'en sais.
Je ne suis pas exempt de vice non plus, et a ma grande honte crie parfois un peu plus sur mes coéquipier que ce que la raison ne le voudrait.
Cependant le jeu est excellent, il ne faut pas commencer par regarder les mouvements technique des nombreux tutoriels youtube, mais bel et bien apprendre par une technique mystique et visiblement oublié par la plupart des joueurs, j'ai nommé "la passe" qui sera votre meilleure arme pour monter les divisions.
Bref le jeu est technique, nerveux, agréable en main malgré les débuts difficiles (crash et desynch) et bien plus amusant avec des amis pour se liguer sur les pauvres anonymes (qui ne sont souvent pas si mauvais que ca) si vous n'êtes pas cinq.

"Evitez de casser votre manette et rester courtois" devrait être le moto officiel cet excellent jeu.
"Mais putain il joue avec un doigt dans le cul ou quoi?" Sera celui qui sera retenu.

нужно поправить вратарскую систему. из за пинга мяч бывает пролетает мимо рук, когда ты должен было взять мяч, он пролетает мимо. так же когда мяч плюс минус в спокойном состоянии если на него прыгнуть в перед, то бывает персонаж пролетает над ним. Я так раз пропустил мяч от тимейта, он его мне пнул, а я на него прыгнул и по всем законам здравого смысла, я должен был его взять, но нет, он пролетел подомной и закатился в ворота. Вообще из за пинга страдает не только вратарская система, а всё в общем. Те у кого пинг меньше принимают мяч раньше, они бегают быстрее, чаще забивают. Rematch no es solo un juego de fútbol. Es un campo de batalla emocional donde controlas un jugador y tu orgullo al mismo tiempo. Si tuviera un hijo, lo llamaría “Castigo”, y si tuviera dos, serían “Extra Effort” y “Stamina Boost”, para que aprendan desde pequeños que correr no solo es cuestión de piernas, sino de estrategia. Yo no corro: explotó mis reservas justo al filo del pase perfecto.

Respiro ritmo de 6 minutos intensos, sudo en paredes virtuales como si fueran muros reales. Ya no pienso en vacaciones: pienso en el pase entre muros. Si cierro los ojos, visualizo mis primeros 5v5 en arenas con cámara en tercera persona—sin fueras de juego, sin VAR, sin perdón. Los desarrolladores, hartos de dar golpes, encontraron un nuevo pulso… golpeando con una pelota.
Mi mamá dice que esto es solo fútbol… pero ella no ha vivido un comeback con 4‑1 abajo en menos de 3 minutos. Ella no sabe lo que es defender como si fueras portero o delantero según el momento. No sabe lo que es sentir el silencio del balón en cámara lenta, esperando el clunk al impactar contra la red.

La comunidad ya lo puso a prueba: más de 2,5 millones de jugadores en el primer fin de semana, casi 12 millones de partidos, 55 millones de goles… y sin contar los que fallaron un pase crucial . El estudio sabe que no va a ser un sucesor de FIFA, pero es un simulador de pedir el balón, correr y decidir .

El día que ya no suenen los gritos de “Ball!” y “I got it!” en partida es porque ya no quedará nadie suficiente entregado. Porque yo no juego simplemente.
Yo corro paredes.
Yo leo el pase.
Yo decido el clutch.
Yo… soy el Rematch.

It's very fun. It has big glaring problems with basically all aspects of the game from non-existent ranked matchmaking to game-breaking bugs, netcode desync problems, servers deciding on a whim whether you've caught the ball or sent it to the net, this can go on. And the community ranges from new to egotistical, but in the rare occasions where you get a good game going with other people who have seen or even played a football match before - it's very, very good. I've played a lot of these "control a single player" football games and despite the aformentioned issues, I can comfortably say that this is the single best multiplayer football game on the market right now. After a few months I think it's going to carve out its on place among the many good online games that you can play with friends. There's also great potential for a competitive scene.

100% recommend this if you are into football, and if you play 5-a-side or even 11v11, you'll love this game.

Oyunun Fiyatı Fazla Ama Oyun Muazzam Bir Oyun
Si eres retrasado y chupón no lo compres.

Henüz betadan çıkmış bir oyun olarak birçok teknik sorun barındırsa da, potansiyeli yüksek bir yapım. Fakat bu potansiyelin ortaya çıkabilmesi için bazı temel sorunların acilen çözülmesi gerekiyor.

Topu ayağıma almama rağmen kaplamanın olduğu yerde durması ve benim topa vurmadığım sürece ayağımdaki topu görememem mi dersin, oyuncuların hepsinin kaplamasının kaybolup sadece topu görmem mi dersin (kendim de dahil her oyuncu kayboldu kaybettik o maçı da) daha neler neler. Bunların rekabetçi maçta yaşanıyor olması da ayrı sinir bozucu, hazır oyun yeni çıkmışken hızlı yükselelim diyordum 2 günde soğuttular şuan tek tük giriyorum oyuna. Rocket League’de olduğu gibi, tüm modları tek seferde aratabileceğimiz bir sistem gelmeli. Bu, bu tarz hızlı ve rekabetçi oyunlarda oyuncu deneyimini ciddi şekilde iyileştiriyor. Çünkü hızlı maçta 4v4 te oyun asla bulmazken 3v3 ve 5v5 te bulabiliyorsun, bazen sadece 3v3te maç atılıyor diğerlerinde bulamıyorsun ama hemen oynamak isteyince bu insanın canını sıkıyor. Aynı anda her modu aratıp bi an önce oyuna geçebilmemiz lazım. Elite editiona sahibim ama normal mi alsaydım acaba dediğim çok oldu. Umarım bu verdiğimiz ücretler oyuna yeterince destek olabilir ve hataları düzeltebilirsiniz. 

Birkaç da önerim var, topu olduğumuz yerde havaya kaldırabilme, oto çalımların arttırılması (en az 3 tane olmalı bence), oyun berabereyken belli bir süre daha uzarsa örneğin 8 dakika uzatma dakikası oynanmışsa her oyuncu tek tek orta sahada başlayıp rakip kaleye tek başına yeteneklerini kullanarak gol atmaya çalışmalıdır, klasik penaltılar gibi ama top sürme ve çalımlama da dahil. Kaleci topu aldığı an atış biter gibi. En çok gol atan takım da maçı alır, tekli performansların çok önemli olduğu bir oyun çünkü. Tuş atama kısmı var mı yok mu anlamak çok güç olduğundan hala klasik ayarları kullanıyorum fakat o kısım kesinlikle değişmeli. Ben kaleciyken atılma hareketini farenin sol tıkına atamak istiyorum vururken de gene sol tıkı kullanabilmeliyim. Hızlı oyunda maç seçeneklerinin hepsini seçip daha hızlı oyun bulabilme kısmı zaten kesinlikle olması gereken bir özellik. Adı üstünde hızlı oyun, 2 saat maç aratmak istemiyorum.

Valla iyisiyle kötüsüyle oyun dünyasındaki büyük eksiklikleri doldurabilecek potansiyeli olduğunu düşündüğüm bir oyun kendileri. Şu anki durumuna 10 üzerinden 6,5 puan verebilirim sanırım. Umarım hataları en kısa zamanda düzeltilir ve topluluktan gelen fikir ve önerileri dikkate alırlar. Sonuçta ne kadar iyi oyun yaparsanız yapın o oyunun başarıya ulaşmasını sağlayanlar oyuncularıdır.
Orrendamente bello, ogni tanto ci sono dei problemi, ma non tanti quanto le persone dicono (magari è solo il mio caso)

Great graphics, and very beginner friendly, I would give it a nine out of ten

Definitivamente es MUY BUEN juego, y no es estrictamente necesario jugar con amigos bien coordinados para que funcione el gameplay. 

Eso sí, hay cambios que ojalá los devs apliquen en el futuro, por ejemplo : 

- Un sistema de comunicación/frases más eficiente y con más opciones
- La opción de jugar contra bots o IA para jugadores primerizos o algún modo Single Player
- Ciertas mejoras a la hora de recoger la pelota o el feedback cuando vuelves a controlar el balón, ya que se escapa demasiado pronto

Y algo que creo yo que le daría un plus a los equipos competitivos ; 
- PERSONALIZACIÓN DE EMBLEMAS Y ESTANDARTES

Hay varias equipaciones que se pueden asemejar a las de un equipo de futbol per se, y si se añadiese alguna customización de escudos, los jugadores que sí que cuentan con amigos o con un equipo que se quisieran meter en el competitivo como un club de fútbol, tendrían herramientas bastante atractivas para destacar visualmente.

Por lo demás, REMATCH no me ha decepcionado, al revés, ha superado mis expectativas.
A día de hoy, es el único multijugador que le echo mas horas de las que me puedo permitir...

reviews.review: 删减版rush模式，就目前而言操作内容极少，自由度是比ea做的更好的，画风也很棒，而且守门员是最好玩的位置，除了守门员其他的可玩性不高，作为主打3V3 4V4 5V5的街球游戏，核心过人花式只有一个彩虹过人（这个花式甚至就是一个按钮...），太单一了，足球最经典的油炸丸子，牛尾巴，马赛回旋等花式都没有，手柄玩家右摇杆根本用不到，另外我认为这种街球模式应该是要有特技的，加速，大力射门，盘带，铲球，能做的东西太多了，单纯花钱买了个半成品玩，另外提一嘴，这游戏甚至还没出键位修改....不建议现在入手，如果玩腻了fc（fifa）或者实况可以试试
